name: Oportun
description_short: Dallas, TX — Oportun at 3420 W Illinois Ave Suite 200A offers personal loans with flexible terms and quick approval for qualifying borrowers.
description_long:
Located at 3420 W Illinois Ave Suite 200A in Dallas, TX, this Oportun branch operates as a standalone lending office serving the local community. The Dallas location maintains hours of Monday through Friday from 11:00 AM to 6:30 PM, Saturday from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM, and is closed on Sundays. This accessible Dallas address provides a professional space for residents to discuss and apply for personal loans.

This Dallas branch specializes in personal loans with flexible terms and quick approval for qualified borrowers. Contact the office at +1 214-273-4450 to speak with a loan specialist about application requirements, funding timelines, and repayment options available at this location. The team can address your specific financial needs and guide you through the lending process.

When visiting this Dallas location, bring a valid government-issued ID and recent income documentation to expedite your application. Oportun focuses on making personal loans accessible to borrowers with varying credit histories and financial backgrounds. Plan your visit during business hours and ask about same-day funding options.
address: 3420 W Illinois Ave Suite 200A, Dallas, TX 75211

company_info.headquarters: 3420 W Illinois Ave Suite 200A, Dallas, TX 75211

pros: Nationwide physical store locations across all 50 states and D.C.
Accepts consular IDs — accessible to immigrants without a driver's license or U.S. passport
Cash payment accepted at grocery stores, pharmacies, and corner stores via 5 payment networks
Bilingual service in English and Spanish
Offers both secured (car title) and unsecured personal loans
Mobile app with referral program ($50 bonus per referral)
cons: In-person application required — no fully online process mentioned
Secured loan requires handing over car title, creating repossession risk
PayNearMe cash payments carry a fee ($1.75 per transaction)
No loan amounts, APR ranges, or terms disclosed on the location page reviewed
Proof of address requires a physical bill — P.O. Boxes explicitly excluded
best_for: Borrowers without a U.S. driver's license who hold a consular or passport ID
Spanish-speaking customers who prefer bilingual in-person service
Unbanked or cash-preferred borrowers who need to make loan payments without a bank account
Borrowers with thin credit files who need a lender with physical branches
diagnosis: Oportun is best for borrowers who need to apply in person, prefer cash payment options, or hold non-U.S. IDs — particularly immigrant and Spanish-speaking communities underserved by traditional lenders. The main caveat is that secured loans put your vehicle at risk, and the website does not disclose APRs or loan limits, so borrowers must visit a branch or call to compare actual costs before committing.
services: In-person loan applications at branch locations
Cash loan payments at retail partner locations
meta_description: Oportun at 3420 W Illinois Ave Suite 200A, Dallas, TX. Fast personal loans with flexible approval.
